The '''JZ-5 Fusial Thrust Engine''' was a type of [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight engine]] that was developed and manufactured by [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]]. While the [[Engine/Legends|engine]] installed on an [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|A/SF-01 starfighter]] was usually a [[Quadex/Legends|Quadex]] [[Kyromaster ion engine/Legends|Kyromaster]], alternate configurations mounted four individual JZ-5 Fusial Thrust Engines.<ref name="EGVV" /> They were sometimes used for [[Podracer engine/Legends|engines]] on [[Podracer/Legends|Podracers]].<ref name="EV" />
